creator: mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com
text:
20.02.2013 11:25, Max Brazhnikov ???????(??):
> You don't need patching bsd.port.mk for this, see devel/geany-plugin* ports 
> for example.
Yes, putting the same bits into a Makefile.common somewhere would
achieve the same goal, but there is no clear guidance on when to use
which approach.

Is it the official portmgr@ recommendation, that owfs ports (owlib --
the foundation, fuse-owfs, owtcl, owhttpd) use a Makefile.common (under,
perhaps, devel/owlib/), rather than Mk/bsd.owfs.mk ?

Thanks!

    -mi
